title: SessionEvent
description: Contract B v2 — lifecycle event emitted by ludo-agent. The seam between ludo-agent and apps/api. Breaking v2: kind -> type, new event-type enum, schema_version '2.0', gate_required -> checkpoint_required.

session_id.description: The worker session id (apps stores it as ludo_session_id), or the job id for job-level events before a session is minted.

checkpoint_required.description: Per-event operator review/decision flag (reserved; false for now). Distinct from a resumable state checkpoint.
